claims.text: What is claimed is: 1. A compound of the formula I ##STR30## wherein R 1 is in the 4-position and represents a C1-4-alkyl, C 3-7 -cycloalkyl or trifluoromethyl group, R 2 represents a benzimidazol-2-y...
8. A method for treating hypertension which comprises administering to a mammalian host suffering from the same an antihypertensive amount of a compound of claims 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6.
8. A method for treating hypertension which comprises administering to a mammalian host suffering from the same an antihypertensive amount of a compound of claims 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6.
8. A method for treating hypertension which comprises administering to a mammalian host suffering from the same an antihypertensive amount of a compound of claims 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6.

indications.text:
MICARDIS HCT (telmisartan and hydrochlorothiazide) is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower
blood pressure. Lowering blood pressure reduces the risk of fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular events, primarily
strokes and myocardial infarctions. These benefits have been seen in controlled ...

Micardis® HCT (telmisartan and hydrochlorothiazide) tablets are indicated for the treatment of
hypertension. This fixed dose combination is not indicated for initial therapy (see DOSAGE AND
ADMINISTRATION).
